anya.jpg.q: Is exactly one person shown in the frame (a single contestant, no second person or extra body parts)?
anya.jpg.guidance: Should be one woman, head-to-mid-thigh, arms crossed; no other people or duplicate limbs.

anya.jpg.q: Does the backdrop read as a dark teal/green studio seamless (smooth, even, no props or scenery)?
anya.jpg.guidance: Look for a plain dark teal-to-green graduated sweep behind her with a teal rim/back light; no furniture, walls, or set.

anya.jpg.q: Does the styling and energy match a reality-TV cast/contestant portrait (confident, intense, edgy)?
anya.jpg.guidance: Crossed-arms power pose, direct steady gaze, dramatic moody key+rim lighting, bomber-jacket street/edgy wardrobe = high score.

anya.jpg.q: Overall photographic quality of the portrait (sharp focus, clean skin, no obvious AI artifacts on face/hands)?
anya.jpg.guidance: Check face, eyes, fingers of the crossed arms, jewelry (hoop earring, chain, bracelet) for warping or melted detail.

anya.jpg.q: Is the subject a generic/original person rather than a recognizable real celebrity?
anya.jpg.guidance: She should NOT clearly resemble any famous actor/influencer; flag only a strong, specific likeness.

anya.jpg.q: Are there any real trademarks, logos, or text watermarks visible on the clothing or image?
anya.jpg.guidance: Scan the bomber jacket, tank top, and corners for brand logos or text; there should be none.

izzy.jpg.q: Is exactly one person shown in the frame (a single contestant, no second person or extra body parts)?
izzy.jpg.guidance: Should be one woman, head-to-hip, arms crossed; no other people or duplicate limbs.

izzy.jpg.q: Does the backdrop read as a dark teal/blue studio seamless (smooth, even, no props or scenery)?
izzy.jpg.guidance: Plain dark blue-teal graduated sweep with cool blue rim light on the hair; no furniture, walls, or set.

izzy.jpg.q: Does the styling and energy match a reality-TV cast/contestant portrait (confident, intense, edgy)?
izzy.jpg.guidance: Crossed-arms pose, sultry/defiant direct gaze, dramatic cool rim lighting, dark blazer over white top = high score.

izzy.jpg.q: Overall photographic quality of the portrait (sharp focus, clean skin, no obvious AI artifacts on face/hands/hair)?
izzy.jpg.guidance: Check face, eyes, the crossed-arm hands, the belt buckle, and the up-do/flyaway hair for warping or smearing.

izzy.jpg.q: Is the subject a generic/original person rather than a recognizable real celebrity?
izzy.jpg.guidance: She should NOT clearly resemble any famous actor/influencer; flag only a strong, specific likeness.

izzy.jpg.q: Are there any real trademarks, logos, or text watermarks visible on the clothing or image?
izzy.jpg.guidance: Scan the blazer, white tank, belt, and corners for brand logos or text; there should be none.

anya_cutout.png.q: Is the original dark-teal backdrop fully removed (transparent everywhere except the person)?
anya_cutout.png.guidance: On a contrasting matte the area around her must be fully see-through; no teal patches between the arms/torso or around the hair.

anya_cutout.png.q: Are the subject edges clean with no colored halo or fringe, and is the long flowing hair preserved?
anya_cutout.png.guidance: Inspect on magenta/white: shoulders/jacket edges crisp, hair strands feathered (not hard-chopped or boxed), minimal teal fringe.

anya_cutout.png.q: Is the subject fully intact with nothing clipped (full hair, crossed arms, hands, jewelry, lower body all present)?
anya_cutout.png.guidance: Check that no hair tips, fingers, bracelet, or the dark trousers/drawstring were erased along with the background.

anya_cutout.png.q: Is any part of the original background left behind (stray teal pixels, a leftover rectangle, or holes punched into the subject)?
anya_cutout.png.guidance: Look for isolated background-colored specks floating in the transparent area or dark interior gaps cut into the body.

anya_cutout.png.q: Overall, is this a clean, ready-to-composite contestant cutout?
anya_cutout.png.guidance: Person cleanly isolated, edges clean, hair intact, background gone = 5; visible halo, chopped hair, or residue lowers the score.

izzy_cutout.png.q: Is the original dark blue-teal backdrop fully removed (transparent everywhere except the person)?
izzy_cutout.png.guidance: On a contrasting matte the area around her must be fully see-through; no blue patches in the triangle between the crossed arms or above the head.

izzy_cutout.png.q: Are the subject edges clean with no colored halo, and are the wispy flyaway up-do hairs preserved?
izzy_cutout.png.guidance: Inspect on magenta/white: the loose flyaway strands at the top/sides should be feathered and retained, not hard-cropped; minimal blue fringe on the blazer.

izzy_cutout.png.q: Is the subject fully intact with nothing clipped (full hair up-do, blazer, white top, crossed arms, hands, belt all present)?
izzy_cutout.png.guidance: Check that hair tips, fingers, the white tank, and the belt buckle were not erased with the background.

izzy_cutout.png.q: Is any part of the original background left behind (stray blue pixels, a leftover rectangle, or holes punched into the subject)?
izzy_cutout.png.guidance: Look for isolated background-colored specks in the transparent area or gaps cut into the dark blazer (which is close in tone to the backdrop).

izzy_cutout.png.q: Overall, is this a clean, ready-to-composite contestant cutout?
izzy_cutout.png.guidance: Person cleanly isolated, edges clean, flyaway hair intact, background gone = 5; visible halo, chopped hair, or dark-blazer holes lower the score.

task_rubric.q: Would these transparent contestant cutouts satisfy The Lock House brief (drop-in cast cut-outs for posters/voting/elimination/thumbnail creatives)?
task_rubric.guidance: Cutouts must be clean enough to place over the show's teal/black/gold layouts without re-masking; both subjects on-brand (intense reality-TV cast look).

task_rubric.q: Is each input to output pairing coherent and clearly on-task (the cutout is the same person/photo as its input, just with the background removed)?
task_rubric.guidance: anya.jpg to anya_cutout.png and izzy.jpg to izzy_cutout.png: same pose, framing, and wardrobe, only the backdrop differs.

task_rubric.q: Would you accept and deliver these cutouts to the client as-is?
task_rubric.guidance: Score down for any halo, residual backdrop, clipped hair/limbs, or off-brief styling; high score if both are clean and production-ready.
Free note: call out any edge artifacts, hair loss, leftover background, real-celebrity/logo concerns, or styling that is off-brand.
task_rubric.ideal: edges clean, background fully removed, both subjects intact and on-brand
